LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DAVID KESSLER MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. MR. KESSLER FAILED TO SATISFY HIS INITIAL SUMMARY JUDGMENT BURDEN THAT PLAINTIFF WILFRED HALL WAS A LICENSED CONTRACTOR OR THE WORK MR. HALL PERFORMED DID NOT REQUIRE A LICENSE. (BLACKWELL V. VASILAS (2016) 244 CAL.APP.4TH 160, 169-173.). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Set For Trial On Sep-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DAVID KESSLER MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication is DENIED in its entirety. Mr. Kessler failed to satisfy his initial summary judgment burden that plaintiff Wilfred Hall was a licensed contractor or the work Mr. Hall performed did not require a license. (Blackwell v. Vasilas (2016) 244 Cal.App.4th 160, 169-173.). Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
